description: Style NoteThis summer give your little one the unique gift of style and comfort with this vest from Madagascar. Featuring an attractive print on its front, this piece will easily capture her heart. Pair it with a cute skirt for summer days or layer on a cardigan for chilly evenings.Product DetailsPink vest with printed front, round neck with overlapped shoulder, sleeveless, dark pink binding at neck and armholeMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warmIron on reverse
